ghlUserId.description: GoHighLevel user ID this rep's leads are assigned to (contact.assignedTo).

role.description: Account Executive or Associate Account Executive.

capacity.description: Max non-exhausted leads this rep should carry. The bot tops reps up toward this number.

active.description: If false, the rep receives no new leads (and is excluded from balancing).

states.description: Optional 2-letter state codes this rep covers. Empty = any state.
